programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lorie gave birth to twin boys, and while she initially thought boyfriend Carlos was the father, she would later believe it was actually Warren, a claim he strongly denies. Warren wants Lorie to stop harassing him about being the father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Courtney is here because he's trying to find out why his fiancée Jasmine has never allowed him to see his daughter in person. Then, Charlita knows that her husband has been cheating with their nanny Stephanie. He admits to cheating only once.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The show continues with more past guests returning to add to the mayhem!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Craig wants the best for his niece, Krysti, and feels her boyfriend, Randy, isn't right for her. Next Teresa plans to raise her child in the KKK and her fiance, a former Klan member, is here to talk some sense into her.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend Marie that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lamont juggles relationships with Quana and Brian, while Cherice struggles with her secret.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Donita reveals her porn dream, David suspects Chastity, and Lee confronts his sister's career choice

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin's man Damo. Then, Ryan and Kristy are engaged, but Ryan says he wants to stop their upcoming nuptials because he slept with Kristy's sister Kayla.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Iris works at a sex club while her husbands in jail; secrets and confessions unfold.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Pamela is here today to tell her best friend, Terri, that she is sleeping with her son, Brandon. Next Deaire has been sleeping with Brenda's 62-year-old mother! Then Brandi will tell her fiancé that she's been having an affair with twin brothers!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kiki and Kat were coworkers who fell in love. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to take their relationship to another level…and person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The show continues with more past guests returning to add to the mayhem!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lisa says she can't stand the constant meddling by her boyfriend's ex, Sarah. Next Deborah suspects that her long-time girlfriend has been cheating on her. Later, Angelina was pregnant when her husband had an affair.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Gertrudis habla con la madre superiora de la mala conducta de Mariana, cuando ella llega acusando a Gertrudis de ser quien ordenó que golpearan a su padre en prisión.

programme.desc: Gertrudis llega furiosa a ver a Mariana porque ella desobedeció y se fue del convento. Mariana le dice que si no la ayuda a sacar a su padre de la cárcel, va a reconquistar a Willy.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Eva esperan que salga Anselmo y lo atropellan con su carro, riendo se alejan de allí. En la cárcel Rosaura se despierta aterrada por una pesadilla, llamando a su padre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le dice a su hermano Iván que está llena de odio y que cree que en la muerte de su madre tiene algo que ver Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.desc: ​​Diego se entera que Diana fue al hospital a visitar a Maximiliano y toma una actitud agresiva contra ella. Bruna y Octavia tienen una pelea respecto a las consecuencias de los actos de Deborah.

programme.desc: Paola ve a Francisco y a Caramelo besándose afuera de la fábrica, por lo que los confronta. Andrés ataca a Gaby y ella le dispara. Gaviota le hace una confesión a Gaby.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Penned in at the bottom of a well, Luffy and Law are caught in a trap! But someone has come to save them who they least expect! Meanwhile, the Tontattas help Franky break in to the SMILE factory, and Bartolomeo resorts to tactics he used in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas locate their captive comrades and seem to be able to get the message to them - the prison break is on! Meanwhile, heavy-hitters from the Colosseum turn from wringing each other's necks towards a unified plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hidden far underground, Kin'emon finds his old friend Kanjuro whose powers allow the two to, quickly, but not elegantly, escape to the surface! Meanwhile, Cavendish shares his fears that the "Birdcage" game Doflamingo is playing has been rigged all along.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are in full revolt! But can they keep their wits about them long enough to make it out? Meanwhile, Zoro finally gains the upper hand against Pica, and Franky finds a way to deal with Señor Pink.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky finally makes it into the factory and the Tontattas are reunited with their captive friends! But Princess Mansherry is nowhere to be found. Factory manager Kuween becomes irate when ignored and launches an attack on Franky.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo draw closer to the Flower Field on the fourth level of the Royal Palace plateau, but a sudden attack by Gladius' exploding spheres sends Robin and Bartolomeo hurtling towards the level below.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash's bond with his daughter strengthens as more Knights of Sumeria join Pablo and him to defeat evil. Kelly decides to go after Ruby herself while Ash and team, along with the knights enter the rift and face a battle of their own.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby's latest creation is her most diabolical plan yet to turn Brandy against her father. Pablo suspects something isn't quite right with Kelly when she meets him and Ash at the school. Chaos ensues when evil shows up at the school dance.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash and Pablo realize the rift in the cellar is the key to saving humanity, and devise a plan to save the ones they love.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING), her daughter Ashley (EMILIE ULLERUP), and new to the Sanctuary, Dr. Will Zimmerman (ROBIN DUNNE) release three women from a mysterious crypt in Scotland, bringing them back to the Sanctuary for refuge.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: An investigation into a string of bizarre robberies leads Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and Will (ROBIN DUNNE) to a crime ring of thieves who seem to be able to slip between the cracks of the law...literally.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Returning with an abnormal captured in the Himalayas, Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and Will (ROBIN DUNNE) are stranded from civilization and aid after their plane goes down in a desolate mountain range.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When a mating pair of cute, furry, and seemingly harmless abnormals is brought in for scientific study, the Sanctuary team begins to exhibit some hidden animal attractions for one another.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When the Taelons mastermind the sale of an illicit weapon to trap resistance leader Jonathan Doors (David Hemblen), Lili's estranged father (Doug Lennox) is part of the scheme.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: William Boone (Kevin Kilner) and Agent Sandoval (Von Flores) defend the Taelon scientist Rho-ha (Kari Matchett), who is ordered to stand trial for murder.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons introduce interdimensional travel to human customers for the sinister purpose of harvesting them for genetic experiments.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An alien probe unleashes a devastating virus on Earth, threatening to kill both the human and Taelon races.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance races against time to infiltrate a remote Taelon lab to destroy the alien probe which holds the liberation movement's secrets. Vint Cerf, “Father of the Internet”, makes a special guest star appearance.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Abyss has infected Beka. The crew must find a way to save her.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: After some of the crew is captured, Harper is forced to work on a time bridge for the Patriarch.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A spy from Tri Gemma shows up on the Andromeda in an attempt to steal the Star Map.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a string of elderly people are brutally murdered in their homes along the Mississippi River, a Task Force is formed to hunt down a serial killer before they can strike again.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A gruesome, execution-style double murder of a young couple shakes a small mountain community in Eastern Tennessee; with no evidence or DNA left at the crime scene, police rely on the rumor mill and their instincts to try and identify suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A kindhearted single mother is found brutally murdered, inside her own home; three potential suspects quickly arise, all claiming innocence, and it's up to the Largo Police detectives to find out who is the cold blooded killer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A homicide of a beloved young coal miner sends shockwaves through a conservative mining community; as multiple suspects arise, detectives try to determine if the killing was a robbery gone wrong, a crime of passion, or possibly a hate crime.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother of two, Heather Strong, disappears, leaving her two children with her estranged husband, Josh; as Josh becomes an obvious suspect, an unlikely and sinister offender emerges.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman; police are unable to solve the case until they speak to her husband's close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lover; Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A woman discovers the body of her nephew and investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise, but with three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, it becomes a cat-and-mouse game as they must get inside his mind to get him to lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance and detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her home, police aren't sure if it's an accident or a murder until they get an unexpected call, from an unexpected person.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: Sonia y Froy llegan con una orden de incautación de una camioneta, el dueño pierde el control e intenta detener a Sonia, pero ella logra someterlo. Un joven intenta evitar que le quiten la camioneta a su padre, pero Sonia tiene una orden de embargo.

programme.title: Operación Repo
programme.desc: Lui y Froy harán un embargo de un auto, pero el propietario les avisa que ya tiene un acuerdo con la financiera, así que deben parar el embargo. Luego, tienen que embargar un auto porque la financiera piensa que es un fraude.

programme.title: Operación Repo
programme.desc: La financiera llama a Sonia para pedirle que recupere un auto antes de que la dueña vaya a hacer el pago, ella reacciona ante el embargo. El siguiente embargo se vuelve peligroso ante el temperamento de Matt.

programme.title: Operación Repo
programme.desc: Mientras buscaba un coche que confiscar, Froy le pregunta a Sonia sobre su última cita. Habrá que incautar un auto que el dueño reclama que pagó. Sonia y Matt tienen que incautar un auto sin seguro.

programme.title: Rescate aéreo

programme.title: Rescate aéreo

programme.title: Rescate aéreo
programme.desc: Kacee, un ciclista de 14 años que cruza el motor, hace tambalearse la muerte (tambaleos de velocidad) y voltea.

programme.title: Rescate aéreo

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La manera respetuosa de un infractor asombra a los agentes. Un oficial sigue sus instintos al ver actividad sospechosa en una gasolinera. Una discusión durante la cena acaba con llamada a la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Oficiales se sorprenden cuando ven a un reincidente. Cuando los enfrenta la policía, un hombre demuestra no querer a la novia. Oficiales traen una unidad canina para inspeccionar un vehículo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Después de una persecución peligrosa, los oficiales se dividen y toman rumbos diferentes. Un personaje sospechoso acusa a los policías de ser un grupo poco confiable.

programme.title: George Carlin: On Location at USC
programme.desc: George Carlin’s March 5, 1977 standup concert at the University of Southern California showcases his unique role as America’s first counter-culture comedian.

programme.title: George Carlin: On Campus
programme.desc: In his New York City grammar school, George Carlin was known as a “disruptive influence in the classroom.” With this concert, the ultimate class clown is back at school at UCLA, making another generation of students roar with laughter.

programme.title: George Carlin: At Carnegie
programme.desc: Taped before a sold-out house at New York City´s Carnegie Hall, the performance represents a creative resurgence for Carlin, following a heart attack earlier that year.

programme.title: George Carlin: George's Best Stuff
programme.desc: George’s Best Stuff is a compilation of some of Carlin’s legendary routines, including “A Place For My Stuff,” “Dogs and Cats,” “Baseball and Football" and others.

programme.title: George Carlin Personal Favorites
programme.desc: This HBO special presentation highlights the best of his live performances in Los Angeles, New Jersey, Phoenix, and New York from 1977 to 1998.

programme.title: George Carlin: You Are All Diseased
programme.desc: Growing up in New York City, George Carlin was always the class clown. He went on to become one of the great comedians of our time, with an appeal that has spanned generations.

programme.title: George Carlin: What Am I Doing in New Jersey?
programme.desc: George Carlin's sixth HBO stand-up concert special, "What Am I Doin' in New Jersey," aired as a live broadcast from the Park Theater in Union City, New Jersey.

programme.title: George Carlin: Playin' With Your Head
programme.desc: George Carlin presents one of his most hysterical stand-up comedy performances in this one-man show recorded at the Beverly Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: George Carlin: Playin' With Your Head
programme.desc: George Carlin presents one of his most hysterical stand-up comedy performances in this one-man show recorded at the Beverly Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: George Carlin: Jammin' in New York
programme.desc: When George Carlin was asked which HBO concert was his favorite, his answer was always, “Jammin’ In New York.”

programme.title: George Carlin: It's Bad for Ya
programme.desc: It’s Bad For Ya, Carlin's Emmy-nominated 14th and final HBO special from March of 2008 features Carlin's irreverent and unapologetic observations.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When a military research base is attacked, a small group of civilians and military personnel escape on a ship into deep space. But divisions emerge between those who want to attempt a return to Earth and those who want to remain aboard the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Carter takes a young cadet under her wing on a mission to a remote planet inhabited by unique electronic beings. But when the creatures suddenly turn aggressive, SG-1 will need the cadet's brainpower to help them escape with their lives!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Hortencia escucha cuando Bustillo menciona que tiene que matar al viejo, ella le dice a Martín que no tome ninguna pastilla que le den. Los Reyes y las Elizondo subastan las joyas de Eduvina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel le aclara a Benito que toda la herencia va a ser para Ruth, aunque estén molestas y tengan diferentes opiniones sobre los Reyes. Fernando piensa en otras formas de presionar a Gabriela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela grita para que Raquel la escuche y la ayude, la amiga va al sótano y la ve amordazada, al no poderla liberar huye y tiene un accidente fatal. Se cumple otro sueño premonitorio de Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth está desconsolada por la muerte de sus padres, ahora más que nunca necesita el apoyo de sus amigos. Dínora tortura psicológicamente a Gabriela, le dice que por su culpa, Raquel murió.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan trata de sacar a Paula de su vida con dinero, pero ella no está dispuesta. Sofía intenta convencerla para que firme el acuerdo y se vayan las dos para siempre de la casa. Pedro y Julieta son descubiertos y se declara una guerra entre hermanos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José traiciona a su hermano por dinero e intenta aliarse con Pedro para quitarle la administración de la hacienda. Sofía hace revelaciones a Paula sobre la identidad de su padre, para empujarla a tomar las decisiones que ella está tramando.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José reúne a todos los hermanos y se enfrenta a Juan porque quiere reemplazarlo. Julieta mantiene su posición con dignidad y no accede a hacer las paces con su marido, mientras Paula decide seguir insistiendo sin saber que una verdad la persigue.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La envidia termina por separar y enfrentar a los hermanos del Monte. Julieta entra a la casa de Sofía y Paula para destrozarla, sus acciones descontroladas tienen como desenlace el regreso de ellas a la hacienda, pero nadie imagina lo que sucederá.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: En la celda, Antonia se corta las venas frente a Gabriela. Al llegar al hospital, quiere que Alejandro y David la ayuden a morir. Guerra está dispuesta a vengarse de Gabriela de la forma que sea. Lucho se entrega a la justicia y Ricardo lo defenderá.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia escapa del hospital. Lagarto la sigue y termina malherido. Francisca tiene un mal presentimiento y mientras cocina con Cecilia, Antonia llega a su casa y las encañona. Lucho es puesto en libertad hasta que la jueza dicte sentencia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia y Gabriela se enfrentan en la mina. La vieja patrona le dispara a su propio hijo. Chacón aparece y cumple su venganza. Antonia queda cuadripléjica. Alejandro y Gabriela se casan. Nace Tomasito y trae una nueva esperanza a su hermana Lucía.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia escucha cuando Bustillo menciona que tiene que matar al viejo, ella le dice a Martín que no tome ninguna pastilla que le den. Los Reyes y las Elizondo subastan las joyas de Eduvina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel le aclara a Benito que toda la herencia va a ser para Ruth, aunque estén molestas y tengan diferentes opiniones sobre los Reyes. Fernando piensa en otras formas de presionar a Gabriela.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.desc: Come along into the heart of the Amazon River Basin as Jack explores untouched jungles that are teeming with wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's in the Fiji Islands where he prepares for the most hands-on fishing trip of his life. Find out how the local people catch dinner using vines.Then they get a look at the top-secret methods used to create the most colorful pearls in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of his favorite beaches and meets the animals that live there, like Sea Turtles, Sea Lions, and loads of other marine life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Botswana's Okavango Delta, Jack's daughter, Kathaleen, joins him on safari. Together at Vumbura Camp, father and daughter encounter lions, then strike out on their own adventures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is in Malaysia getting a little closer than he would like to lots and lots of crocodiles! Then he has an unforgettable encounter with a King Cobra before trekking up into Batu Caves just outside of Kuala Lampur.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he joins the massive operation to relocate several Big Horns from Tonto National Forest to the Catalina Mountains in an effort to reintroduce the animals back into their native range.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Picky Eaters
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on six species that take picky eating to the extreme! A panda that brunches on bamboo, marsupials that munch on eucalyptus, flamingoes that savor the flavor of algae, plus many more finicky eaters are on today’s countdown menu.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Colossal Creatures
programme.desc: Jack travels the world meeting six colossal creatures, like the African elephant, Galapagos tortoise, ostrich, whale shark, mandrill and anaconda!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to Canada to check out four World Heritage sites in beautiful Alberta.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Take a peek behind-the-scenes of some massive animal transport operations, all to help animals in need, like bringing a gorilla to his doctor’s appointment, herding blesbok to food-filled savannahs and many more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he discovers what it’s like to work in the wild thanks to six of the wildest guides ever. African Elephants, Hippos, Guanacos, Gorillas, Wildebeest, Zebra, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack pays a nostalgic visit to Central Florida where he got his start as a zoo director thirty years ago. Through old film clips and personal reminisces, Jungle Jack recalls his days at the one and a half acre Sanford Zoo.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Greatest Apes
programme.desc: There are more than 200 different kinds of primates in the world today, but did you know only five are members of the exclusive club of great apes? Come along with Jack as he counts down his greatest great ape encounters!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he comes face-to-face with the powerful pachyderms of Chobe National Park. The park is known for its massive elephant population, but Jack also encounters Hippos, Cape Buffalo, Kudu, Crocs, Warthogs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hanna Detective Agency
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is putting his detective skills to the test to solve six mysteries from the animal kingdom. A disappearing civet in Borneo, a missing elephant in Kenya, a bat de-coding investigation in Panama, and several more mysterious mammals!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack kicks things off in western Canada where he learns the horse riding ropes from a genuine cowboy, then he heads to Florida to visit a very different kind of retirement home, all before seeing an incredible horse whisperer at work in California.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack uncovers creatures that are experts at blending into their surroundings, like Cheetahs, Okapi, Leopards, Wagler's Pit Vipers, Geckos, and African Painted Dogs!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer. The plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark discovers that the new preacher and his wife are impostors planning a robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Several men are vying for a prosperous rancher's daughter's affections. When she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas receives a series of mysterious threatening notes from an ex-convict with a grudge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After shooting a man in self-defense, Andy Moon turns to Lucas for protection from the man's vengeful brothers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds himself involved in murder when he gallantly steps to the aid of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing; Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis; Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov. Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop; Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine checkup; Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help a stranger from another community called Riverbend; they run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help Aaron and Gabriel on a rescue mission; in the chaos, Negan finds himself watching over Hershel; Sebastian coerces Daryl and Rosita into pulling a heist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby marches Daryl and troops to confront Maggie at Hilltop; after a harrowing heist, Rosita gets Connie, Kelly, Eugene, and Max to investigate the Miltons; Ezekiel helps hospital patients in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby; Hornsby hires Leah to kill Maggie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families; Pamela deals with protestors demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes; Mercer needs Rosita's help to fight a swarm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident; Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappears them from the Commonwealth; Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination; Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan and Annie find themselves at a work site; Daryl and Carol follow a train that has taken Connie aboard.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the warden; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside; Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital; Rosita, Eugene and Gabriel search for Coco; Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela; as the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, the heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie finds Negan, and they travel to Manhattan; a marshal named Armstrong follows Negan; meeting a quiet young girl named Ginny.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron y Maggie se encuentran a la governadora Pamela Milton mientras recorre Alexandria, Oceanside y Hilltop. Ezekiel tiene suerte durante un control de rutina. Eugene procesa la historia de Max.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia y Elijah ayudan a un extraño de otra comunidad llamada Riverbend. Se encuentran con Aaron, quien les cuenta sobre una misión en la que se embarcó con Gabriel como emisarios de la Mancomunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia y Elijah ayudan a Aaron y a Gabriel en una misión de rescate. En medio del caos, Negan vigila a Hershel. Sebastian fuerza a Daryl y Rosita a realizar un atraco.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby obliga a Daryl y a sus tropas a enfrentarse contra Maggie en Hilltop. Tras un angustioso atraco, Rosita consigue que Connie, Kelly, Eugene y Max investiguen a los Milton. Ezekiel ayuda a los pacientes del hospital.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie se prepara para defender Hilltop y a los habitantes de Riverbend frente al ataque de Hornsby. Mientras tanto, éste contrata a Leah para que la mate.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Negan se introducen en la Mancomunidad para obligar a Hornsby a que deje de perseguir a sus familias. Pamela enfrenta las protestas de aquellos que están hartos de la impunidad de los crímenes de Sebastian.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Pamela hacen un trato de borrón y cuenta nueva en nombre de sus amigos. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se marchan hacia Oceanside para hablarles de un plan. La Commonwealth celebra el Día de los Fundadores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene huye después del incidente del Día de los Fundadores. Pamela le pide a Mercer que investigue dónde está, para disgusto de Max y La Princesa. Por otro lado, Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se topan con un contratiempo peculiar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol investigan el paradero de sus amigos después de que Pamela los hiciera desaparecer de la Commonwealth. Por desgracia, su única pista es Hornsby. Por otro lado, Pamela le pide a Yumiko que procese a Eugene en nombre de la Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de separarse de sus hijos, Maggie, Gabriel y Rosita siguen un convoy militar hasta un destino misterioso. Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan y Annie acaban en una zona de obras. Daryl y Carol siguen a un tren que lleva a Connie a bordo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel y Negan organizan una revuelta clandestina contra los guardianes. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se unen a Luke y a Jules durante su huida a la costa. Además, Eugene es juzgado con el apoyo de Yumiko como abogada defensora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los alejandrinos y los prisioneros vuelven a la Commonwealth para enfrentarse a Pamela Milton. Por otro lado, una horda se acerca a la ciudad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol llevan a Judith al hospital, mientras que Rosita, Eugene y Gabriel buscan a Coco. Por otro lado, Maggie y Negan se enfrentan a Pamela y los héroes se reúnen para una última batalla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Dead City
programme.desc: Maggie y Negan viajan a un Manhattan posapocalíptico aislado del continente hace mucho tiempo; la ciudad en ruinas está llena de muertos y habitantes que han hecho de Nueva York un mundo lleno de anarquía, peligro, belleza y terror.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Morgan encuentran una horda descomunal de zombis en una cantera cercana a Alexandria. Entretanto, Carter convoca a varios habitantes de Alexandria para proponerles un plan: matar a Rick.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A tall, powerfully built girl, Kitten Twitty, registers at a hotel and secret agent James T. West carries her trunk to her room, not knowing it contains his archenemy—diminutive, giggling Dr. Loveless.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon find the town of Willow Springs looted and its citizens completely immobile -- victims of a mysterious paralysis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent, James T. West, investigating the murder of a fellow agent, discovers a plot to assassinate the President of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A self-styled maharajah kidnaps secret agent James T. West and holds him captive in his palace.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon again face Dr. Loveless whom, planning to rule a world of "little people," reduces West to a six-inch miniature.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A mad woman scientist creates a bomb-carrying robot identical to agent Westand orders it to kill members of the President's cabinet.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon employ the services of a man who possesses a power of concentration that controls animals.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West gets involved in a bizarre extortion scheme involving green "Venusians" who claim they need gold for spaceship fuel.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon visit a town named Justice during Law and Order Seek and find it the site for a convention of criminals.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon are assigned to free a fellow agent from Devil's Island.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is kidnapped by a madman who plans to create an underwater kingdom that will control the world's shipping lanes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The evil, diminutive Dr. Loveless impoverishes an Indian tribe so that he can become their benefactor -- and their god.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fail to save the life of a highly unpopular Latin American dictator they have been assigned to guard.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent Gordon has a vivid nightmare about a prisoner's mother's ghost who attempts to clear the name of her son, imprisoned 35 years.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook works on the front yard. Norm Abram looks at the second unit. The homeowner learns to maintain her new countertops. Richard Trethewey installs a new water heater.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: With one week left, Kevin O’Connor learns to install tiles for the kitchen backsplash. Kevin visits our previous non-profit development. Tom Silva helps install the new stairs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The job nears completion thanks to the dedication of general contractor David Lopes. The team gathers for the wrap party and all agree that it was a successful partnership.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This Old House opens a brand new season by helping the Sharma family renovate their 1940s house on Boston's famous Charles River.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger preps for the new foundation of the entry hall. The sun porch gets demolished. Norm visits the original gatehouse. A team of concrete cutters cuts through the 10-inch concrete foundation walls.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom uses a crane to lift a 17-foot steel beam. Norm sees the insulated concrete forms used for the foundations and above-grade walls. Tom and Kevin discuss new lead laws and the kitchen is gutted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom levels the kitchen floor. Norm frames the first floor. Richard sees how the Charles River has been formed through engineering projects. Tom and Kevin contend with the termites and carpenter ants.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm checks the new front entry. Tom turns the flat roof into a pitched one. We review the new kitchen layout. Roger shows native and non-native species. Norm and Tom set new deck footings.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Norm frame the sunroom’s roof and install deck underlayment. Richard shows an expensive new change order on the back-to-back basement bathrooms. Kevin learns about photographer Jules Aarons.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs floor-warming radiant heat. A new basement floor and footings are poured. The team makes aesthetic decisions. Tom installs vinyl clad windows to reveal the Charles River view.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tom patch sidewall shingles. Richard installs ductwork for a hydronic HVAC system. Rough electrical finishes with 4-inch, dimmable LED recessed lights. Norm and Tom install a pocket door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom blends new basement with old using acrylic stucco. Tom waterproofs the new entry roof. Four kinds of insulation are installed: eco-friendly batt, cellulose, and open- and closed-cell spray foam.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jen shows her plan for the front yard. Kevin blends old plaster work with new. Roger safely takes down a Norway maple. Kevin and Norm tour Boston and the Charles River. Henrique stains cedar shingles.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger sets footings for the new pergola and selects a vine for the front yard. Norm and Tom trim the first-floor windows. Norm uses pitching sticks to create a mud job at the base of the new shower.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom puts down new-generation composite decking. New paint promises richer colors and low VOCs—Mauro shows Kevin how it performs. A few simple modifications to the fireplace mantel updates its style.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a walkway with fieldstone. Tom shows Kevin how to recognize a quality cabinet and kitchen island. A bathroom gets new black and white tile. Norm boxes in the sunroom ceiling beams.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new custom pergola is installed. Tom modifies the staircase to match the house’s design. Roger preps garden beds for planting a tall birch and perennials. Tom installs a click-together floor.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: New wireless security systems, marble kitchen-window stool, granite countertops and "His and hers" closets are installed. We see the high-efficiency HVAC system. Tom shows a new "smart lock”.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: In the last episode of the Auburndale project, we review the entire house and the entire team celebrates seven months of hard work with the traditional wrap party on the banks of Charles River.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This Old House goes Hollywood with the first-ever renovation project in the Los Angeles area. The homeowners plan to renovate their 1933 Spanish Colonial Revival house while keeping its character.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram and Kevin O'Connor stop by one of LA's movie studios to find homeowner Kurt Albrecht at work. In the basement, Richard Trethewey reviews the heating and cooling systems being installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin arrives at the L.A. house to find the custom tiles, windows, and doors. In Griffith Park, Richard sees L.A.’s new water supply infrastructure. Alfonso evaluates the condition of our stucco.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm wrestles with creative details. The stucco system starts on the addition. Kevin sees California modern architecture. Norm shows a formaldehyde-free batt insulation. Kevin meets a tile specialist.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Custom foam forms and the "cat face" plaster technique replicate existing detail in the house. Norm visits cabinetmaker Larry Buckland. The existing roof on the main house will have to be replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Alfonso shows Kevin the last two steps of the stucco system. We see the house’s new period-appropriate ornamental ironwork. The reproduction tile for our project is hand-glazed and goes up inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1930s floors are matched with red oak and walnut. The new back terrace, with corbels and tile, is constructed. We see attractive low water plants. Kevin gets a close look at the Hollywood sign.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kitchen cabinets, soapstone countertops, an archway, and a coved ceiling are installed. Richard helps with a pedestal sink. The Juliette balcony and decorative iron balustrade are installed.

programme.title: Tommy Morrison vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1993 Tommy Morrison battled George Foreman for the WBO world heavyweight title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas with Foreman getting a point deducted in round ten the bout resulted in a victory for Morrison.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On April 15th, 1985, Marvin Hagler fought Thomas Hearns for the undisputed Middleweight Title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. Hagler and Hearns absolutely went at it from the bell which ended with Hagler securing a thrilling knockout victory.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Davey Moore
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1983 Roberto Duran fought Davey Moore for the WBA World Super welterweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York Moore was knocked down in the 7th round giving the win to Duran.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ivan Robinson
programme.desc: On May 28th, 2005 Julio Cesar Chavez and Ivan Robinson faced eachother at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in an unamimous decision victory for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Randall Bailey vs Mike Jones
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Randall Bailey and Mike Jones fought for vacant IBF World welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas that ended in the 11th round by knockout resulting in a victory for Bailey.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Cleveland Williams
programme.desc: On November 14th, 1966 Muhammad Ali faced Cleveland Williams at the Astrodome in Houston, TX. They fought for WBC World Heavyweight titles in what was supposed to be a 15 round bout only went 3 resulting in a win for Ali.

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997 Micky Ward and Alfonso Sanchez faced eachother at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas the 10 round bout ended after seven giving Ward the victory by technical knockout.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Arturo Frias
programme.desc: On May 8th, 1982 Ray Mancini and Arturo Frias fought for the WBA World Lightweight title at the Aladdin in Las Vegas with what was supposed to be a 15 round bout ending in the first by technical knockout securing the victory for Ray Mancini.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: Hector Camacho vs Sugar Ray Leonard
programme.desc: On January 3rd, 1997 Hector Camacho faced Sugar Ray Leonard at the Convention Center in Atlantic City battling for IBC Middleweight title the bout ended after five rounds resulting in a victory for Leonard by technical knockout.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Oscar Natalio Bonavena
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1970 Muhammad Ali faced Oscar Natalio Bonavena in a 15 round bout with Bonavena going down three times in the last round forcing an automatic stoggage giving the win to Ali.

programme.title: James Toney vs Dave Tiberi
programme.desc: On February 8th, 1992 James Toney faced Dave Tiberi for the IBF World Middleweight at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic City with a point deducted from Tiberi for a low blow the bout ended in a split decision win for Toney.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Adilson Rodrigues
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 George Foreman fought Adilson Rodrigues at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a victory for Foreman in round two by technical knockout.

programme.title: Bridezillas

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has joined the enemy! Is she brainwashed, or is there some deeper reason for her unexpected transformation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the Seal of Orichalcos, Mai coordinates her Harpie Ladies to whittle Joey's forces into waste! Is this the last we'll see of him, or will a legendary guardian recognize Joey as a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the potent powers of Claw of Hermos, Joey transforms Time Wizard into an almighty... hammer? Can Joey master the uncanny abilities of his new card to pound Mai's Harpie Ladies before they slash him to shreds?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Professor Hawkins has discovered startling connections between the world's conundrums, the Orichalcos stones and an ancient lost civilization.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a Wild West showdown between Yugi and his fiercest challenge yet: Rafael and his guardian monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi calls on the legendary strength of Timaeus, but when it's not enough to crack Rafael's defense, will Yugi resort to desperate measures and go against everything he believes in to make the riskiest move of his life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Using the abilities of Seal of Orichalcos, Yugi grinds Rafael's guardians, but he's also succumbing to the card's evil influence. As darkness grows within his heart, the consequences of his non-heroic acts may be his undoing.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz has captured Yugi's soul! Broken and unmotivated, how will our heroes ever rescue Yugi, especially when Dartz has a duo of nefarious new recruits ready to eradicate them?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: A cross-country expedition turns tragic when Dartz's new duelists separate Yugi from Joey in order to capture their souls separately.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Nothing will stop Weevil and Rex Raptor from quenching their thirst for revenge by capturing Yugi and Joey's souls!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost the trust of Timaeus, Yugi can no longer use his guardian dragon against Weevil's insect invasion. Discouraged and confused, Yugi has lost his dueling instincts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is on a vision quest where he must travel through a past of evil to find and conquer his greatest foe... himself.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
